target.name: Verkor
target.founder: Benoit Lemaignan, Christophe Mille, Sylvain Paineau, Philippe Chain, Gilles Moreau, Olivier Dufour

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 3 same-sector + same-stage peers in Climate & Energy. Range: $700M - $2.0B.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Climate & Bio-Manufacturing

private.name: KoBold Metals
private.rationale: Same sector (Climate & Energy), same stage (Series C), post-money $2B+

private.name: Electric Hydrogen
private.rationale: Same sector (Climate & Energy), same stage (Series C), post-money $1B+

private.name: Amogy
private.rationale: Same sector (Climate & Energy), same stage (Series C), post-money $700M

data.narrative:
Verkor is a Series C-stage climate and energy technology company that has raised over €3B to date. The valuation assessment draws on a comparable universe of 9 private peers and 1 public comparable (Linamar, LNZA), with primary focus on 3 same-sector, same-stage private companies: KoBold Metals ($2.0B), Electric Hydrogen ($1.0B), and Amogy ($700M).

The peer-median method, the applicable triangulation approach given available data, yields an implied valuation of $1.0B, representing the median across the 3-company peer set. The broader peer range spans $700M to $2.0B, reflecting meaningful dispersion in how the market values Series C climate-tech businesses. This method captures recent institutional pricing from companies operating in comparable technology domains and financing stages.

The triangulated valuation range is $850M to $1.1B, with a central point of $1.0B. This narrow band reflects reliance on a single methodological input and limited public market data on comparable businesses. Key uncertainties include the applicability of peers in distinct subsectors within climate and energy, and the pace of capital deployment relative to technology milestones. Additional methods such as DCF or revenue multiples would require operational data not provided here. The $1.0B median should be treated as indicative pending fuller operational and market context.
